HGSS.100.0000:
The karate uniform is the uniform
of fighters!\f
There is nothing better suited for
going to the Battle Frontier than this!
HGSS.100.0001:
Some people are surprised to see a
small girl like me at the Battle Frontier\r
all by herself.\f
It’s not like I have to battle myself,
you know?
HGSS.100.0002:
My lifelong hobby has been
battling using Pokémon.\f
A battle after breakfast,
a battle after lunch,\r
and after dinner...\r
I just take a bath and go to bed.
